method: MCP get_relevant_files calls for the five unknown implementation-check areas
limitation: Markdown and hidden-governance paths were returned as file or directory nodes with span=null and exact_spans=[]; no file:line evidence was available from the MCP responses.

investigations.finding: Relevant public docs were found, but MCP indexing skipped .agent where several referenced contract docs/templates are declared to live.
Relevant harness documentation was found, but MCP graph diagnostics show hidden overlay paths such as .codex and .github were skipped.

investigations.area: data policy, memory governance, telemetry, run records, and schemas
investigations.finding: Schema and memory-governance evidence exists in indexed paths; exact contract docs under .agent were not visible to the graph.

investigations.area: agent skills location and SKILL.md discoverability/frontmatter
top_evidence: docs/Designing Reliable Complex Skills for AI Coding Agents: A Practical Manual for Deterministic and LLM-Based Workflow Control.md
investigations.finding: Skill guidance docs were found, but .agents/skills was skipped by the graph build.

investigations.area: internal consistency of docs and current readiness expectations
investigations.finding: The docs corpus is indexed and broad, but the implementation checker still returned five unknown clauses rather than a compliant verdict.
